name: Lemon Ice
recipeInstructions:
Makes about 3 cups or 6 servings. In a saucepan, boil sugar and water for 5 minutes; let cool. Pour into a large bowl and mix in lemon peel and juice. Freeze until it becomes mushy but still slightly firm. Beat with a mixer until smooth. Return to freezer and beat again. Spread evenly in a chilled shallow pan (8 inches X 8 inches) or two ice trays. Freeze until completely firm. Cover tightly.
(Note: The original recipe did not specify the thickness of the finished product, so this version assumes it will be a frozen dessert that is easily spoonable but still retains some texture.)
